name: Chicken Mac Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 boned and skinned chicken breast halves, cooked and cubed
8 ounces elbow macaroni, cooked and drained
20 ounces frozen chopped broccoli, cooked and drained
1 can reduced-fat cream of chicken soup
1 can cream of broccoli soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook chicken in boiling water until done. Remove from water.
2. Cook macaroni in the cooked chicken water; drain. Add broccoli.
3. Mix sour cream and soups together. Stir in chicken, macaroni, and broccoli.
4. Transfer to a greased 9x13 pan. Sprinkle with shredded cheese.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until bubbly and heated through.
